Torn pages litter the ground in every direction. Officers locate a large portion of the torn book nearby, identifying it as a Star Wars book and confirming it belongs to the Loveland Public Library. As officers wrap up at the scene, another team arrives at the Larimer County Jail with Joshua, whose behavior shows no signs of slowing down.

Joshua Campbell was charged with seven offenses, including third-degree assault, assault on an at-risk adult, resisting arrest, obstructing a peace officer, disorderly conduct, and criminal mischief. He also had two outstanding warrants for failure to appear. He was granted a $2,000 bond and scheduled to appear in court on February 13th, but as of now, no sentencing information has been made public.
